Maximilian Wackenhuth
ResearchTeachingConferences

Publications and Preprints

  • Linear Programming Bounds for Non-Euclidean Sphere Packings, doctoral thesis (2025), archived here
  • Linear programming bounds in homogeneous spaces, I: Optimal packing density, Preprint (2025), arXiv
  • Bounds on hyperbolic sphere packings: on a conjecture by Cohn and Zhao, C. R. Math. 364 (2026), Journal, arXiv

Invited Talks

  • Spherical harmonic analysis, stochastic geometry and sphere packings, Oberseminar “Geometrische und harmonische Analysis”, Paderborn University, April 2025
  • On sphere packing bounds conjectured by Cohn and Zhao, Weihnachtsworkshop, Saarland University, December 2024
